breaking.title_zh: 马斯克出庭作证OpenAI诉讼：索赔超1340亿美元，要求恢复非营利架构
breaking.title_en: Musk Testifies in OpenAI Trial: Demands $134B+ Damages, Non-Profit Reversal
breaking.summary_zh: 马斯克正式出庭作证，指控OpenAI及其CEO奥特曼背弃非营利使命，将慈善机构转变为营利实体。诉讼索赔超1340亿美元，要求恢复非营利架构并罢免现任高管。
breaking.summary_en: Musk takes the stand accusing OpenAI and CEO Altman of betraying the non-profit mission. Lawsuit demands over $134B in damages, restoration of non-profit structure, and removal of current executives.

breaking.title_zh: OpenAI发布ChatGPT Images 2.0：像素级复刻现实，假图零拦截
breaking.title_en: OpenAI Launches ChatGPT Images 2.0: Pixel-Perfect Reality Replication, Zero Fake Detection
breaking.summary_zh: OpenAI正式发布最新图像生成模型ChatGPT Images 2.0，对真实世界的复刻达到像素级别。媒体实测发现，生成的假图在各平台遭遇零拦截，且没有AI生成水印，引发虚假信息担忧。
breaking.summary_en: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Images 2.0 with pixel-level reality replication. Media tests show generated fake images pass undetected across platforms with no AI watermark, raising misinformation concerns.

daily.title_zh: 工信部+国家数据局联合发布'模数共振'行动：20个行业攻关AI智能体
daily.title_en: MIIT + National Data Bureau Launch 'Model-Data Resonance' Action: 20 Industries to Deploy AI Agents
daily.excerpt_zh: 两部门联合印发通知，提出到2026年底基本形成'数据—模型—场景应用'良性互促循环，在20个行业推动产出一批人工智能应用场景，攻关一批行业模型、专用模型和特色智能体。
daily.excerpt_en: Two ministries jointly issue notice to establish 'data-model-scenario' virtuous cycle by end of 2026, promoting AI applications across 20 industries with specialized models and intelligent agents.

daily.title_zh: OpenAI与亚马逊AWS深度合作：模型+Codex登陆Bedrock平台
daily.title_en: OpenAI Partners with Amazon AWS: Models + Codex Launch on Bedrock
daily.excerpt_zh: 在结束与微软独家云合作仅一天后，OpenAI迅速宣布与AWS达成深度合作。Amazon Bedrock将新增OpenAI模型服务，帮助企业客户在AWS上构建可投入生产的AI代理。
daily.excerpt_en: Just one day after ending exclusive cloud partnership with Microsoft, OpenAI announces deep AWS collaboration. Amazon Bedrock will add OpenAI model services for enterprise AI agent development.

daily.title_zh: DeepSeek发布V4预览版：百万Token超长文本算力消耗降至27%
daily.title_en: DeepSeek Releases V4 Preview: Million-Token Processing at 27% Compute Cost
daily.excerpt_zh: DeepSeek发布新一代旗舰模型V4预览版，分Pro与Flash两个版本。处理100万Token超长文本时，算力消耗仅为上一代27%，内存占用降至10%，API价格全球最低水平。
daily.excerpt_en: DeepSeek launches V4 preview with Pro and Flash variants. Processing 1M tokens costs only 27% of previous generation compute, memory usage down to 10%, with globally lowest API pricing.

daily.title_zh: Anthropic Claude全面接入Adobe、Blender等八大创意软件生态
daily.title_en: Anthropic Claude Integrates with Adobe, Blender and 8 Major Creative Platforms
daily.excerpt_zh: Anthropic宣布升级Claude，面向创意人士新增多款专属连接器，全面接入Adobe、Blender、Ableton、Autodesk Fusion等八大主流创意平台，将AI能力深度整合至专业工作流。
daily.excerpt_en: Anthropic upgrades Claude with new connectors for creatives, integrating with Adobe, Blender, Ableton, Autodesk Fusion and 5 other major creative platforms for professional workflows.

daily.title_zh: AI算力爆发引爆电力需求：数据中心耗电激增，高压与液冷技术重构格局
daily.title_en: AI Compute Boom Drives Power Demand Surge: Data Center Energy Crisis
daily.excerpt_zh: AI算力产业爆发式增长催生全新电力需求增量与技术变革。AI数据中心耗电激增，高压与液冷技术正在重构电力行业竞争格局。
daily.excerpt_en: AI compute boom creates unprecedented power demand growth. Data center energy consumption surges, with high-voltage and liquid cooling technologies reshaping the power industry landscape.

daily.title_zh: OpenAI业绩未达标报道引发AI概念股全线大跌
daily.title_en: OpenAI Misses Targets Report Triggers AI Stock Selloff
daily.excerpt_zh: 报道称OpenAI未能达成销售额及用户增长核心目标，AI概念股应声大跌。甲骨文跌4.1%、CoreWeave跌5.8%、AMD跌3.4%、英伟达跌1.6%，创近一个月最差单日表现。
daily.excerpt_en: Reports that OpenAI missed sales and user growth targets trigger AI stock selloff. Oracle -4.1%, CoreWeave -5.8%, AMD -3.4%, NVIDIA -1.6% — worst single-day performance in a month.

daily.title_zh: 白宫紧急约谈科技企业：Anthropic Claude Mythos拉高网络安全风险
daily.title_en: White House Emergency Tech Summit: Anthropic Mythos Raises Cybersecurity Risks
daily.excerpt_zh: 多家科技与网络安全企业与白宫举行闭门会谈，议题涵盖AI网络安全。Anthropic最新推出的Claude Mythos模型具备高阶黑客攻击能力，成为会议焦点风险议题。
daily.excerpt_en: Tech and cybersecurity firms hold closed-door White House talks on AI security. Anthropic's Claude Mythos model's advanced hacking capabilities become focal risk discussion point.

daily.title_zh: 亚马逊推出AI生产力软件套件：面向物流和招聘场景
daily.title_en: Amazon Launches AI Productivity Suite for Logistics and Recruitment
daily.excerpt_zh: AWS宣布推出Amazon Connect Decisions和Amazon Connect Talent工具，依赖AI代理自动执行面试、创建预测需求电子表格等任务，与微软、甲骨文、Salesforce直接竞争。
daily.excerpt_en: AWS launches Amazon Connect Decisions and Talent tools using AI agents for automated interviews and demand forecasting spreadsheets, directly competing with Microsoft, Oracle, and Salesforce.

items.title_zh: 工信部+国家数据局模数共振行动

items.title_en: AI compute drives power demand surge

items.title_zh: OpenAI业绩未达标引发股价大跌

谷歌员工拒绝美军AI业务
